data.title: Cross Ocean and CP Group buy 8-building Central Florida portfolio for $96 million; 722,456 sq ft; 93% leased in Orlando.
data.description: A global asset management platform, Cross Ocean Partners, in collaboration with CP Group, a prominent owner-operator of office properties, has revealed the purchase of an office portfolio in Central Florida. The acquisition, priced at $96 million, encompasses a total of 722,456 square feet spread across eight buildings. The portfolio, located within the Orlando metro area, currently boasts a high occupancy rate of 93 percent.

data.title: The Post-Holiday Reality Check: Senior Care Experts Guide Families Through Next Steps After Concerning Holiday Observations
data.description: In-home care services provided by professionals can provide a solution for adult children who have observed changes in their aging parents. This has become a pressing issue for many as the new year begins in 2026. Adult children are increasingly realizing that their parents require assistance, with a significant number of families across the country facing this tough reality in the aftermath of the holiday season. Seeking support from in-home care agencies could offer a way forward for these families as they navigate the challenges of caring for aging loved ones.

data.title: AppYea appoints Mark Katzenelson as President & Board Member for commercial execution phase. OTQB: APYP.
data.description: Mark Katzenelson has been appointed as a key leader at AppYea, Inc. (OTCQB: APYP) in Jerusalem. This decision will aid in the company's transition towards commercial execution and institutional deployment. Katzenelson, the Techlott Founder, will play a crucial role in this transition process.

data.title: ACP CreativIT rebrands as Tusker after acquiring five firms; plans more.
data.description: Chicago-based company ACP CreativIT revealed today that they have acquired five regional firms since 2017. This full-service technology solutions provider is planning for more acquisitions in the near future. The rebranding of the company aims to consolidate their presence in the market and enhance their services. This strategic move comes at a time when the company is experiencing significant growth, with plans to expand their reach and impact.

data.title: APT price may surge to $2.10-$2.43 by January 2026. Short-term target: $2.05-$2.10, Bullish breakout at $1.97, support at $1.68.
data.description: Based on the latest data, the price prediction for APT is as follows: in the short term (1 week), the target range is between $2.05 and $2.10. Looking slightly further ahead to the medium term (1 month), the forecasted range is between $2.10 and $2.43. The level indicating a bullish breakout sits at $1.97, while critical support is at $1.68.

data.title: Architectural Fabrication and Armetco Systems merge to boost capabilities in cladding and aluminum systems nationwide.
data.description: A new unified platform based in Fort Worth, Texas is enhancing national capabilities in architectural cladding, fabrication, and specialty aluminum systems. On January 13, 2026, Architectural Fabrication and Armetco Systems revealed a strategic merger of their operations. This collaboration aims to leverage their strengths and expertise in the industry. This development is expected to greatly impact the sector, with combined resources now totaling in significant numbers, benefiting both companies and their clients.

data.title: Orlando announces 26 new experiences for 2026, including a Slotharium and a new sports team, boosting tourism.
data.description: In January 13, 2026, Orlando, known as the Theme Park Capital of the World and the top destination in the U.S. for visitors, is launching new attractions in the upcoming year. These include the groundbreaking Slotharium, a world-first attraction, and the introduction of Orlando's latest pro sports team. The city's ongoing expansion highlights its status as a premier tourist destination with record-breaking visitation numbers.

data.title: SUPERWISE partners with NuevoSono to integrate AI into high-resolution IVUS platform without capital equipment for seamless cath lab integration.
data.description: A strategic partnership has been formed between SUPERWISE®, a prominent enterprise AI governance and observability provider, and NuevoSono. NuevoSono is revolutionizing intravascular ultrasound (IVUS) to streamline clinical workflow and integrate seamlessly into cath labs without requiring capital equipment. This collaboration entails the incorporation of reliable, explainable AI into NuevoSono’s latest IVUS platform. The goal is to create the most advanced ultrasound system globally for coronary plaque.

data.title: The Peanut Institute encourages brain-healthy habits in 2026 due to rising Alzheimer's cases. Embrace quality sleep, nutritious diet.
data.description: In Albany, Georgia, on January 13, 2026, a push for positive change is underway as the prevalence of Alzheimer's disease rises. The Peanut Institute urges individuals to adopt brain-healthy practices this year. Quality sleep and regular exercise are particularly emphasized as beneficial for brain health. Alzheimer's cases have been on the rise, prompting a call to action for prioritizing cognitive well-being. The institute stresses the importance of promoting brain health in the face of this concerning trend.

data.title: Atlanta Hawks partner with ManageEngine to enhance IT operations and elevate fan experience at State Farm Arena.
data.description: A collaboration between ManageEngine, a division of Zoho Corp., and the Atlanta Hawks of State Farm Arena in Austin, Texas, has been established to boost the team's IT operations. This partnership aims to improve the technology infrastructure supporting the acclaimed downtown Atlanta venue. ManageEngine's comprehensive platform will facilitate the Hawks' IT ecosystem, emphasizing visibility, automation, and proactive decision-making. This collaboration will enhance the entire IT operations of the Hawks and State Farm Arena.

data.title: TRX may hit $0.32-$0.35 by Feb 2026, with a 20% increase from current $0.30, supported by MACD and RSI.
data.description: Experts forecasting TRON's price anticipate a potential increase of 20%, pushing it into the $0.32 to $0.35 range. TRX is currently challenging the crucial $0.30 resistance level amidst bullish MACD signals and a neutral RSI placement.

data.title: Larridin appoints SaaS leader Nick Mehta to Board of Directors, bringing over a decade of industry experience.
data.description: In San Francisco, Larridin, an AI measurement and scaling platform, made an announcement today regarding the appointment of Nick Mehta to its Board of Directors. Mehta, the former CEO of Gainsight during the period of 2013 to 2025, is recognized as a key figure in the customer success sector and an influential advocate for data-backed growth within enterprise software firms. Boasting more than ten years of expertise in revolutionizing customer interactions and enhancing retention rates for B2B SaaS enterprises, Mehta’s insights are expected to play a crucial role in shaping Larridin’s strategies.
